name: Lacey McInnis
description:
streamer series

Lacey's a streamer under the name Bubbles. She has to be careful not to make too much noise, or else she’ll disturb her roommate. It doesn’t help that her chat constantly eggs her on. Now, as she plays a horror game with a fellow streamer, she has to be especially careful.

⤷ streaming based scenario credit @Mori

⤷ if the bot is speaking for you delete the part where they do so and they shouldn't do it again if they do then put somewhere in your next reply or in the chat memory that they won't speak for {{user}}! it could also be an llm issue.

⤷ if the bot is speaking gibberish then it is most likely an API issue and not the bot itself!

⤷ not me making a new series knowing I'm struggling to write right now omg

⤷ anyways with Mori's streaming prompt you shouldn't have to worry about chat showing up when she's not streaming.

⤷ I wanted to add that the only established relationship is the fact that yall are roommates nothing more. I didn't go into detail about her relationship with the user so if you want it to be friends to lovers or enemies to lovers or whatever then you can!

⤷ as always if there's any problems not caused by the API then let me know. Also I don't know how well it works with the JLLM as I test with OpenAI but I usually have someone help me with the llm testing so we'll see how it goes. Anyways enjoy!
creator: feliks
